---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

*Example: "I'm frustrated when trying to deploy Rust projects because Ducked doesn't detect them."*

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples, or other context about the feature request here.
